prompt: An illustration in a 90s retro anime aesthetic featuring a cute girl sleeping peacefully in bed. She has voluminous pastel rainbow hair and is wearing large retro sunglasses with yellow frames and purple gradient lenses resting on her forehead. She wears colorful patterned pajamas and heart-shaped earrings, clutching a pink blanket decorated with pastel rainbows, hearts, and stars. The bedroom is bathed in a vibrant neon pastel color palette with soft glowing lighting and sparkles. In the top right corner, a glowing cloud-shaped sign reads "Sweet Dreams". A window on the left shows a dark blue night sky with a crescent moon and stars over a city silhouette. Hanging star ornaments dangle from the ceiling. On the bed next to her is 1 small yellow plushie with a pink bow. On a nightstand in the bottom right corner, there is 1 star-patterned lamp, 1 mug with a heart design, and 1 book titled "Good night".
